entry.title: JLPT N2 in 90 Days: My Study Stack
entry.summary: I'm not a language natural. I failed Japanese once already. Here's the exact system I'm using to not fail again.

No partial credit. Hesitation means it's not really in memory yet."),mdx("p",null,"30 new cards/day \xD7 90 days = 2,700 new cards.
